en: When do you start? When do you start?
ko: 언제 시작해? 언제 시작하냐고?

en: What's happened here, sir, is you brought a knife to a gunfight.
That simply won't do. When does a comedy start?
ko: 여기서 일어난 일은 총싸움에 칼을 가져온 거야.

en: If I had £40 for every time someone shouted that out, I'd be a wealthy man.
ko: 여기서 일어난 일은 총싸움에 칼을 가져온 거야.

en: Oh wait, I do, and I am.
What's your name? My name's Karina. Karina. And what do you do, Karina?
ko: 그건 안 돼. 코미디가 언제 시작하냐고? 누가 그걸 외칠 때마다 40파운드를 받으면 부자겠다. 아 잠깐 받고 있고 부자야.

en: I'm a head teacher. A head teacher?
Like, oral, don't neglect the balls. Ah, that kind of...
ko: 이름이 뭐야? 카리나. 카리나 뭐해? 교장이에요.

en: That kind of thing? Just...
ko: 이름이 뭐야? 카리나. 카리나 뭐해? 교장이에요.

en: She's got a very loving tap on the back of the head there from the other half.
ko: 교장(head teacher)이라고? 오럴처럼? 볼도 신경 쓰라고.

en: Well, she's not fucking bad at that either.
Yeah? What's your greatest comeback?
ko: 그런 거? 남편한테 살짝 맞았네.

en: Your tapestry make or your hairline?
ko: 그런 거? 남편한테 살짝 맞았네.

en: There was a pause in the middle of that, like almost a stutter.
ko: 그것도 못하는 건 아니지.

en: No one was expecting great things. And you fucking powered through.
Fucking funny heckle, well played. Nice to see.
I'm the same old kid, born out of a whorehouse.
ko: 네 최고의 반격이 뭐야? 태피스트리 만드는 거야 헤어라인이야?

en: What, sorry? I'm the same old kid, born out of a whorehouse.
ko: 중간에 멈칫하고 말더듬은 것 같은데 아무도 기대 안 했는데.

en: What? Was I born a disabled kid...
ko: 중간에 멈칫하고 말더듬은 것 같은데 아무도 기대 안 했는데.

en: out of a whorehouse? What do you call a disabled...
Oh, what do I call a disabled kid born out of a whorehouse?
ko: 중간에 멈칫하고 말더듬은 것 같은데 아무도 기대 안 했는데.

en: Anything you fucking like, I would imagine.
ko: 밀어붙였네. 재밌는 야유였어 잘했어.

en: Due to his cripplingly low self-esteem, you'd probably get away with it.
I don't know, I never got your name.
I would say son is probably the answer you're looking for.
ko: 좋아 나는 여전히 창녀촌에서 태어난 꼬마야.

en: Is that where we were going? No. Oh, okay, go ahead.
A brothel sprout. A brothel sprout.
ko: 뭐라고?

en: I think we can agree, my punchline was better.
ko: 창녀촌에서 태어난 꼬마랑 같다고. 뭐? 장애인 꼬마가 창녀촌에서 태어나면?

en: She's had enough. You did, you off?
I am, goodbye. Bye.
ko: 장애인 꼬마를 뭐라고 부르냐고? 아무렇게나 불러도 되겠지.

en: That seems like a very...
You alright? Did you not enjoy the show?
ko: 형편없는 자존감 때문에 괜찮을 거야. 이름이 뭐였지?

en: No, I didn't actually. You didn't like it? No. Oh, well.
I'm thankful for taking a chance on it. I appreciate you buying a ticket and coming and giving it a go.
ko: 아들이 아마 네가 찾는 답이겠지. 그게 답이야?

en: Can you have your money back? Oh, no.
ko: 아니. 좋아 말해봐. 브로셀 스프라우트(brothel sprout/Brussels sprout).

en: Thank you.
